mapper.select:
SELECT ID, STOP_REASON_CLASS_CODE, STOP_REASON_TYPE_CODE, STOP_REASON_NAME, SHORTHAND_CODE, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM M_STOP_REASON
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STOP_REASON(ID, STOP_REASON_CLASS_CODE, STOP_REASON_TYPE_CODE, STOP_REASON_NAME, SHORTHAND_CODE, SORT_NUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{stopReasonClassCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopReasonTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopReasonName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shorthandCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_STOP_REASON SET STOP_REASON_NAME = #{stopReasonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHORTHAND_CODE = #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STOP_REASON_CLASS_CODE = #{stopReasonClassCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STOP_REASON_TYPE_CODE = #{stopReasonTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
